description_long: This object is a pair of scissors featuring two long, straight metallic blades joined at a central pivot. The handles are made of black plastic and are shaped into two oval loops, allowing for a comfortable grip. The blades are sleek and metallic, with pointed tips designed for precision cutting. The pivot joint is visible and appears to be a simple rivet, holding the two blades together securely. The handles are symmetrical and do not show any ergonomic padding or special grip features. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the blades or handles.
description: A pair of scissors with black plastic oval handles and long, pointed metallic blades joined by a central rivet. The design is simple, symmetrical, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing both black oval handles and the pointed metallic blades slightly open.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thinness of the blades and the flat alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the handles and the converging blades from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side profile from the opposite direction, again showing the slim blades and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical oval handles made of hard plastic, ambidextrous, without ergonomic padding or special grip features.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central rivet joint, non-adjustable, standard design.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Two equal-sized oval loops, smooth surface, no soft inserts or anatomical contours, accommodates standard finger placement.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips designed for precision cutting.
